original_snippet_context: Discussion of government measures to combat the economic crisis.
relevant_quote: O sr. Miranda declarou que o governo não fará nenhuma emissão de papel moeda, porque isso seria prejudicial aos interesses do paiz.
justification: While not explicitly mentioning the Caixa de Conversão, the strong opposition to issuing more paper money aligns with the orthodox concern for maintaining a stable currency and avoiding inflation.
